seoTitle: Camden South vs Cameron Park — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Camden South and Cameron Park. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Camden South vs Cameron Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Camden South and Cameron Park.
heading: Camden South vs Cameron Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Camden South, New South Wales and Cameron Park, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Camden South has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Cameron Park (47/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Camden South or Cameron Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Camden South has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Cameron Park scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Camden South scores 15/100 for bushfire risk. Cameron Park scores 56/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Camden South or Cameron Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Camden South has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
